images.prompt: A raw, ultra-realistic 8k photograph of a stunningly beautiful young Japanese female model exuding a top-tier gravure idol aesthetic, captured on a skyscraper observation deck overlooking a sprawling neon city. She wears a trendy, form-fitting varsity jacket with a silky, slightly sheer texture that accentuates her slim waist and ample chest, unzipped just enough to hint at her curves. The background is a luxurious blur of urban lights, creating a dreamy bokeh that centers entirely on her. Bathed in the warm, clear glow of a nearby fireplace, her flawless skin reveals visible pores and faint vellus hair, contrasting with the classic black and white color grade. She offers a gentle, soft smile to the camera, radiating a zen and peaceful atmosphere, as if sharing a secret moment with the viewer. Shot on Sony A7R IV, 85mm f/1.4 GM lens, depth of field, ray tracing, global illumination.8k photo, Large breasts
